description: NPC trade inventory definitions â€” item types and quantities per NPC.

buy mult.description: Percentage of item value vendor pays when buying (1024=100%)

sell mult.description: Percentage of item value vendor charges when selling (1024=100%)

rep mult.description: Percentage of item value vendor charges for repairs (1024=100%)

questflag A.description: First quest flag that triggers modified vendor prices

questsellmult A.description: Sell multiplier when quest A completed (1024=100%)

questbuymult A.description: Buy multiplier when quest A completed (1024=100%)

questrepmult A.description: Repair multiplier when quest A completed (1024=100%)

questflag B.description: Second quest flag for modified prices (stacks with A)

questsellmult B.description: Sell multiplier when quest B completed (1024=100%)

questbuymult B.description: Buy multiplier when quest B completed (1024=100%)

questrepmult B.description: Repair multiplier when quest B completed (1024=100%)

questflag C.description: Third quest flag for modified prices

questsellmult C.description: Sell multiplier when quest C completed (1024=100%)

questbuymult C.description: Buy multiplier when quest C completed (1024=100%)

questrepmult C.description: Repair multiplier when quest C completed (1024=100%)

max buy.description: Maximum gold vendor pays in Normal difficulty

max buy (N).description: Maximum gold vendor pays in Nightmare

max buy (H).description: Maximum gold vendor pays in Hell
